name: Israel Petrochemical Enterprises Ltd.
summary: Israel Petrochemical Enterprises Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates in the petrochemicals industry worldwide. The company is involved in processing of crude oil and provision of various petroleum products, such as gasoline, naphtha, diesel, kerosene, fuel oil, and bitumen. It also manufactures raw materials for the plastic industry comprising polypropylene and polyethylene. In addition, the company manufactures aromatic substances, which include benzene, paraxylene, orthoxylene, and toluene that are used as ingredients in the manufacture of other products. Further, it provides basic oils and waxes, as well as leases tankers to transport fuel products. The company serves fuel and gas marketing companies, industries, gas stations. Israel Petrochemical Enterprises Ltd. sells its products through agents and distributors. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel. Israel Petrochemical Enterprises Ltd. is a subsidiary of Alverstone Ltd.
